title: Biowarfare
body:
Bioweapons in Minecraft. Great for servers, experiments, assasination plots, etc.\
\
Made with MCreator: [https://mcreator.net/](https://mcreator.net/)\
Official Github page: [https://github.com/Cod1ngGamer/Biowarfare/issues](https://github.com/Cod1ngGamer/Biowarfare/issues)

Any re-uploads of this mod are unofficial and may contain malicious code, so be careful.
However, [this mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biowarfare) is an exception, it existed before mine and just happens to have the same name.
